stemHtml: Mountain waves have been observed over the Pyrenees Mountains, therefore, at the lee side, the layer of the air mass at the ridge line is (1) _____. In the air mass above the mountains wind speed will (2) _____ with height and the wind direction will (3) _____ with height.

options.c: (1) stable; (2) increase; (3) back by at least 90º.
options.d: (1) stable; (2) decrease; (3) veer by at least 90º.
